title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.311 - Name of district adopted, when — seal required
text:
162.311.  Name of district adopted, when — seal required. — 1.  The board of education of a seven-director district at its first meeting shall adopt and enter of record the name of the district and shall notify the clerk of the county commission of the name so adopted.  The name adopted shall comply with any applicable regulations of the state board of education.
  2.  The board shall keep a common seal with which to attest its official acts.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 3-31, A.L. 1973 H.B. 158, A.L. 1979 H.B. 280) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 §§ 165.263, 165.323, A.L. 1961 p. 353)
